body.notes: Filed 2026-05-02 during T-web-chat-swadl-regression Haiku test after orphan-browser discovery. Root cause: swadl_cfg.py:88-95 spawns webdriver at module import time. Akien confirmed scope: SWADL was originally selenium-only test framework; now it's also pywinauto + non-test process automation (Igor's Gmail flows, web chat). Split design pre-approved as the right architecture. Design doc to be reviewed before build.
body.title: SWADL: split BaseTest into BaseAutomation+BaseTest, lazify driver creation
body.result: SWADL split shipped (akienm/swadl@84f3567): SWADLBaseAutomation extracted from SWADLTest, driver creation lazified (was spawning Chrome at module import = orphan-browser leak). New @property driver/actions on SWADLBase, maximize_window added to driver interface, SWADLTest.tearDown auto-quits driver. 3 SWADL self-tests pass. TheIgors smoke test consumes SWADLBaseAutomation. Design doc at lab/design_docs/decisions/T-swadl-base-automation-split.md.
body.description:
Split SWADL's monolithic SWADLTest into BaseAutomation (process-automation plumbing — driver + page/flow access) + BaseTest (BaseAutomation + unittest runner glue). Lazify driver creation so importing SWADL no longer spawns a Chrome browser at module-import time. Unblocks Igor-as-user epic, Gmail flow tickets, web-chat regression test, and any future pywinauto-based process automation.

**Affected files:** /home/akien/dev/src/swadl/SWADL/engine/swadl_base_automation.py (NEW); /home/akien/dev/src/swadl/SWADL/engine/swadl_base_test.py (slim down, inherit from BaseAutomation); /home/akien/dev/src/swadl/SWADL/engine/swadl_cfg.py (replace eager driver creation with get_driver() lazy helper + _quit_driver_if_running()); /home/akien/dev/src/swadl/SWADL/engine/swadl_base.py (lazy driver property if needed); /home/akien/TheIgors/tests/test_web_chat_swadl_smoke.py (simplify after lazy driver lands).

**Design rules:** SWADL framework conventions (kwargs-everywhere, state in __dict__, instance properties); docs-in-code on new BaseAutomation class; preserve backward compatibility for existing /Project/ tests in SWADL repo.

**Scope boundary:** IN — split base classes, lazify driver, ship updated TheIgors web-chat smoke test using new pattern, commit to SWADL repo (separate from TheIgors). OUT — adding PyWinAutoDriver (separate ticket); refactoring existing /Project/ tests; new context-manager API for flows.

**Test plan:** (1) SWADL self-test asserting no chrome process exists after `import SWADL.engine.swadl_base_test`; (2) TheIgors web-chat smoke test runs and skips cleanly with zero orphan browsers; (3) existing /Project/*.py tests in SWADL repo still pass.
